intentSynonyms: set a repeat mode in spotify
set repeat mode (off, context, or track) in spotify
description: Set the repeat mode for the current playback. Options are "off" (no repeat), "context" (repeat the current context such as album or playlist), and "track" (repeat the current track).

state.description: Repeat mode: "off", "context" (repeat album/playlist), or "track" (repeat current track)

device_id.description: Device ID to target. If omitted, targets the active device.
